title: Shijing: Yang Zhi Shui (Slow Flows the Stream)
description: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.
introduction: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.

translation.text: Slowly flows that water — it cannot bring along the bundle of firewood. My brothers are not here. I am only with you and the people of another surname. Slowly flows that water — it cannot bring along the bundle of brushwood.
